title: DISASSEMBLY

figures_detected.description: View of transmission showing pulley retaining bolts with arrows indicating their location
Drive belt with harness ties fitted to prevent band separation
Tool KV319-K0090 fitted to secondary pulley showing groove width expansion dimensions of 52-53 mm (2.05-2.09 in), with Seat callout
Secondary pulley being eased away from side case with drive belt engaged in pulley grooves
Two technician hands removing secondary pulley and drive belt together from the transmission

steps.text: Remove the pulley retaining bolts complete with O rings.
Fit two harness ties to the drive belt as shown. This will prevent the bands separating.
Fit Tool to the secondary pulley, and expand the groove width to 52 - 53 mm (2.05- 2.09 in).
warnings: Do not expand the groove width any more than stated, internal damage may occur.

steps.text: Ease the secondary pulley away from the side case.
Engage the pulley grooves and remove the drive belt from the primary pulley.
Remove the secondary pulley and drive belt together.
notes: Pulley/drive belt removal is best achieved with two technicians. While one lifts the secondary pulley and engages the grooves, the other removes the belt from the primary pulley.
Keep components safely stored, in clean conditions, until required for re-assembly.

content_blocks.text: Pulley/drive belt removal is best achieved with two technicians. While one lifts the secondary pulley and engages the grooves, the other removes the belt from the primary pulley.
Keep components safely stored, in clean conditions, until required for re-assembly.

tools_referenced.name: Secondary Pulley Groove Expander Tool
tools_referenced.usage: Fit to secondary pulley and expand groove width to 52-53 mm (2.05-2.09 in) to allow removal of drive belt

model_notes: CVT (Continuously Variable Transmission) disassembly procedure. Applicable to K11 Micra with automatic CVT transmission.
